title: SZL canonical Lambda-gated decision + receipt
description: Canonical verdict a vertical readiness pack maps OUT to a challenge output schema. Carries the Lambda-gate result and a DSSE receipt block. Doctrine v11 — Lambda = Conjecture 1 (never a theorem); signature is real only when a key is present, else the explicit UNSIGNED sentinel.

verdict.description: Lambda-gated verdict. Safety organs are fail-closed (DENY/DEFER when not positively PERMIT).

lambda_value.description: Governance Lambda in [0,1]. Conjecture 1 — never a theorem.

rationale.description: Human-readable basis for the verdict; cited where the organ supports citation (amaru).

receipt_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical PAE payload. Integrity-bound regardless of signing.

dsse_payload_type.description: DSSE payloadType. application/vnd.in-toto+json for mesh receipts.

signature.description: base64 DSSE signature when a key is present, else the literal UNSIGNED-NO-KEY-CONFIGURED sentinel. NEVER a fabricated signature.

key_id.description: Signing key id (e.g. szl-receipts-ed25519) or null when unsigned.
